en-US.win10-eos-multiple-bookmarks-subtitle-tr: Don’t lose your favorite sites when you change your operating system.
Have you built a whole library of bookmarks? Back them up so you can always find them.
en-US.win10-eos-multiple-bookmarks-title-treat: Instantly get your bookmarks on a new device
en-US.win10-eos-multiple-bookmarks-subtitle-tr: Find your favorite sites fast when you upgrade your Windows device.
